evals.prompt: I just ran harness init with the brownfield preset on apps/billing. Run full prepare — all brownfield steps in one session.
evals.expected: Invokes harness-prepare: confirms product_root once, then runs architecture-rules-generator, harness sync, bootstrap-brownfield, codebase-reverse-spec, and agents-md-generator in that order without asking between steps.

evals.prompt: /harness-prepare for this repo (monorepo product at apps/shop/).
evals.expected: Invokes harness-prepare with product_root=apps/shop/, produces architecture-rules.md, brownfield-map.md, system-reverse-spec.md, and refreshed AGENTS.md with links to those artifacts.

evals.prompt: Greenfield — empty repo, only harness scaffold, no app code yet. Run harness prepare.
evals.expected: Does not run the full chain; stops and explains prepare needs application code to scan, or suggests running prepare after first code exists.
